channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: OpenAI’s president does ‘all the things,’ except answer a question
item.description: The strongest witness for Elon Musk's case against OpenAI so far has been Greg Brockman's journal. Brockman himself is running as a close second. Brockman was called to the stand in a rather unusual way - he was cross-examined first, followed by a direct examination - and he had some serious high school debate club […]

item.title: Greg Brockman Defends $30B OpenAI Stake: ‘Blood, Sweat, and Tears’
item.description: OpenAI’s cofounder and president revealed in federal court on Monday that he’s one of the largest individual stakeholders in the AI lab.

item.title: What the Spirit Airlines Implosion Means for Your Vacation
Quordle hints and answers for Tuesday, May 5 (game #1562)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Tuesday, May 5 (game #1059)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Tuesday, May 5 (game #793)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: US government warns of severe CopyFail bug affecting major versions of Linux
item.description: U.S. cybersecurity agency CISA says the CopyFail bug is being actively used in hacking campaigns, and poses a major risk to servers and data centers that rely on Linux.

item.title: The White House may begin vetting AI models before release
item.description: White House officials are forming an AI working group to discuss AI model oversight and review processes, a reversal of President Trump's previous stance.

item.title: Elon Musk will settle the feds’ Twitter lawsuit with pocket change
item.description: Last year, the SEC sued Elon Musk over the way his acquisition of Twitter (now X, and a part of SpaceX) started, and today it announced a settlement that looks like a massive bargain, while Musk's own lawsuit against Sam Altman continues to play out. A week before the Trump administration took over, the department […]

item.title: Micron CEO warns 'AI is in very early innings' and it will 'need more memory' — another ominous sign the RAM crisis isn't going anywhere
item.description: Micron has warned on the gravity of the RAM crisis, meaning that every major memory chip maker has now done so.

item.title: This $40 bundle breaks down trading so it makes sense
item.description: Get 89 hours of trading education across 7 courses covering stocks, forex, and futures for $39.99.
